description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on every push and pull request. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple Python versions and operating systems, including Ubuntu, macOS, and Windows. For each job, check out the repository, set up Python, cache pip dependencies, install Tox, run Tox tests, and upload coverage to Codecov. Additionally, run CLI tests on Ubuntu and verify that emojis.json is up-to-date.
